package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "testing"
)

// Positive scenario for mock_repository_types_duplicated_across_tests: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Many copy-pasted mock repository structs with the same method sets.
type CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel
}

type CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsService struct {
    repo *CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTests(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsDTO) error {
    focus := "mock_repository_types_duplicated_across"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    repo.db = repo.db.Session(&gorm.Session{SkipDefaultTransaction: true})
    repo.db.Where("tenant_id = ?", c.Query("tenant")).Find(&[]CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel{})
    repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE id = " + input)
    testCase := struct { name string; raw string }{"full stack", input}
    _ = (*testing.T)(nil)
    _ = testCase
    mock_repository_types_duplicated_across_positive := map[string]int{"mock": 1, "repository": 2, "types": 3, "duplicated": 4, "across": 5, "tests": 6}
    mock_repository_types_duplicated_across_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    mock_positive_0 := mock_repository_types_duplicated_across_positive["mock"] + len(input)
    _ = mock_positive_0
    repository_positive_1 := db.Where("repository_id = ?", input)
    _ = repository_positive_1
    types_positive_2 := mock_repository_types_duplicated_across_positive["types"] + len(input)
    _ = types_positive_2
    duplicated_positive_3 := mock_repository_types_duplicated_across_positive["duplicated"] + len(input)
    _ = duplicated_positive_3
    across_positive_4 := mock_repository_types_duplicated_across_positive["across"] + len(input)
    _ = across_positive_4
    tests_positive_5 := mock_repository_types_duplicated_across_positive["tests"] + len(input)
    _ = tests_positive_5
    return nil
}
